title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLXIV. Gaffers And Gammers.
content:
Old Betty Blue
                Lost a holiday shoe,
        What can old Betty do?
                Give her another
                To match the other,
        And then she may swagger in two.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCLXIV. Gaffers And Gammers." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
